tracks.label: Parakeet 110M MLX Service
tracks.lane: Local Python Apple Silicon MLX Service
tracks.status_detail: Validated 10-sample local Apple Silicon MLX service artifact using the shared REST and websocket harness.

tracks.label: Parakeet 110M NeMo
tracks.status_detail: Validated 10-sample Compose CPU artifact with an 8-chunk partial cadence.

tracks.label: Qwen MPS
tracks.status_detail: Validated 10-sample local Apple Silicon MPS artifact.

tracks.label: Faster-Whisper Small
tracks.status_detail: Validated 10-sample local CPU baseline using the default service model.

tracks.label: Faster-Whisper Base 80ms Preview
tracks.status_detail: Exploratory 1-sample low-latency preview at 80 ms chunks and a 0.75 s partial window. First visible partial arrived at 1.7 s, while finalization remained extremely slow (~46.9 s), and the binary-frame companion still hit a websocket keepalive close during stop/final.

tracks.label: Qwen Compose
tracks.status_detail: Single-sample legacy artifact remains published because the 2026-06-10 refresh restarted during first generation and REST warmup failed with httpx.ReadError.

tracks.label: Pipecat E2E Faster-Whisper Base
tracks.status_detail: Checked-in single-sample Pipecat E2E artifact using 20 ms source frames bridged into 100 ms websocket chunks. It stays out of the homepage leaderboard until comparable Pipecat E2E artifacts exist across multiple backends.
